facts.primaryTitle: She Heard Teke Teke Behind Her
facts.setting: The sound began behind Nina after the last train passed: teke...
criticalEvents: The sound began behind Nina after the last train passed: teke...
Every time she ran, it matched her speed.
facts.threat: The sound began behind Nina after the last train passed: teke...
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Nina Carter defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
